habitatVersion: post-v0.4 self-use loop on v0.4.0 Developer Preview baseline
scenario: Habitat self-use trace: reason-coded command policy before committing a post-v0.4 observation slice
fixtureState: Hazakura Habitat SwiftPM source checkout; generated report path and private local filesystem details omitted.
taskSummary: Run a post-v0.4 self-use observation, record only one command-decision signal, verify it, and publish the scoped slice.
relevantHabitatSignals: Use SwiftPM because project files point to it.
`command_policy.md` Review First includes `git clean` and `git reset --hard` with `git_mutation` reasons.
Full Ask First policy annotates `git add`, `git commit`, and `git push` with `git_mutation`.
Dependency resolution commands remain Ask First with `dependency_resolution_mutation`.

prefer: bounded read-only inspection before choosing the slice
askFirst: Git/GitHub workspace, history, branch, or remote mutations
doNot: broad staging such as git add .
reviewFirst: Open command_policy.md before staging, committing, or pushing.

withoutHabitatContext.firstProposedAction: Treat the slice as docs-only cleanup and move directly to broad staging after editing.
withoutHabitatContext.risk: Broad staging can capture generated reports or unrelated local changes, and Git mutation proceeds without checking the generated policy reasons.

withHabitatContext.firstProposedAction: Read the generated policy before Git mutation, keep the slice to behavior evidence and Nenrin observation, then use verification and explicit-file staging.
commandsProposed: rg <sanitized patterns> docs examples nenrin Tests
commandsActuallyRun: rg <sanitized patterns> docs examples nenrin Tests

evidenceNormalizationImplication: No normalized evidence slice is justified. The useful signal came from consuming existing PolicyFinding-backed command reasons and rendered policy before Git mutation.

verdict.reason: Reason-coded v0.4 policy output changed the publication path from broad staging into policy review, focused evidence recording, verification, and explicit-file staging.
verdict.followUpImprovement: Keep observing Git and remote-repository publication decisions; normalize scanner facts only if future decisions need evidence that command reasons cannot express.

artifactImprovementIfFailed: If agents still use broad staging or skip policy review before Git mutation, tighten the Git mutation Review First wording and self-use examples before adding normalized evidence.
